name: To Be Hero
overview: Our main character, Uncle, is a no-good father with a messy appearance even though he looks nice, and decorates restrooms. He is a divorced, single-dad and lives with his daughter Min, who is good at both studying and sport. One day, Uncle has been sucked into the toilet that he finished using, and becomes a hero to save the Earth! The price is he lost his ikemen appearance and becomes a fat person!! Uncle's battle to protect the Earth and Min has begun…

trailers.title: 【2022-2023国创动画作品】这个世界需要英雄！我们将一切拯救！《凸变英雄X》【加入会员专享最新集】
『To Be Heroine』5月19日（土）TOKYO MX1にて放送
